fn has_invalid_entry(entries: &[Entry]) -> bool {
    entries.iter().any(|e| e.name.is_empty())
}

fn count_matching(items: &[Item], threshold: f64) -> usize {
    items.iter().filter(|i| i.score > threshold).count()
}

fn find_first_error(results: &[Result<(), String>]) -> Option<&str> {
    results
        .iter()
        .find_map(|r| r.as_ref().err().map(|e| e.as_str()))
}

struct Entry { name: String }
struct Item { score: f64 }
